question: What is the title of the book written by Plato has price lower than the average sale price of all books?
sql: SELECT Book.Title FROM Book JOIN Author_Book ON Book.ISBN = Author_Book.ISBN JOIN Author ON Author_Book.Author = Author.idAuthor WHERE Author.Name = 'Plato' AND Book.SalePrice < (SELECT AVG(SalePrice) FROM Book)

back_translation.intent: 查询特定作者的书籍中，销售价格低于该作者书籍平均销售价格的书名

semantic.reason: 意图描述中错误地将平均价格计算为'该作者书籍平均销售价格'，而原始问题明确要求的是'所有书籍的平均销售价格'。过滤条件部分正确，但目标表/聚合逻辑存在关键差异。
